scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:admin" "npm run dev:cashier"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/admin && npm run build -w apps/cashier
scripts.build:netlify: npm run generate -w packages/database && npm run build -w apps/admin && npm run build -w apps/cashier && mkdir -p apps/cashier/dist/admin && cp -r apps/admin/dist/* apps/cashier/dist/admin/
